caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch on his left wrist is seated in a studio setting. He is speaking into a professional microphone and wearing headphones. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo with the word "HUSTLE" and five stars. To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table in front of him, there is a black object with a red logo and a white mug with red text that says "TALK OUT". The man is gesturing with both hands as he speaks, and his expression and hand positions shift slightly across the sequence, though he remains in the same seated position throughout. A logo in the bottom left corner reads "BOSS TALK".
